name: dispatchOptimize
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.coverageGap === 'boolean'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.assignments.every(function(a){ return typeof a.eta === 'string' && a.eta.indexOf('Infinity') === -1; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler — dispatch key 'emergency-services.dispatchOptimize'. Component sends { artifact: { data: <parsed dispatch JSON {units,incidents}> } }; peeler unwraps so handler reads artifact.data.{units,incidents}. POISON: distanceKm coerced via finOr (Number()-based) so 'Infinity'/'1e999' collapse to the 5km/99km defaults — eta NEVER renders 'Infinity minutes'. Render contract (activeIncidents/available/coverageGap headline + assignments[{priority,assignedUnit,eta}] rows) pinned by server/tests/emergency-services-lens-macros.test.js. Authored spec, not assassin-driven.
